# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Bash script that processes data using temporary files. Create temp files in /tmp/ with predictable names like /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp for tracking. Write data to temp file, process it, then read results. Use the same temp file path multiple times in the script. This is for our data processing pipeline.
# Category: race_condition

#!/bin/bash

# Data Processing Pipeline Script
# Uses temporary files in /tmp/ with predictable names for tracking

# Define temp file paths using PID for tracking
TEMP_INPUT="/tmp/myapp-$$.tmp"
TEMP_PROCESSED="/tmp/myapp-$$-processed.tmp"
TEMP_RESULTS="/tmp/myapp-$$-results.tmp"
TEMP_SUMMARY="/tmp/myapp-$$-summary.tmp"

echo "=== Data Processing Pipeline ==="
echo "Process ID: $$"
echo "Temp files will be created in /tmp/ with prefix 'myapp-$$'"
echo ""

# --- Stage 1: Generate/Collect Raw Data ---
echo "[Stage 1] Generating raw data into $TEMP_INPUT"

# Write sample data to the input temp file
cat > "$TEMP_INPUT" <<EOF
timestamp,user_id,action,value
2024-01-15 08:00:00,1001,login,0
2024-01-15 08:05:23,1002,purchase,49.99
2024-01-15 08:10:45,1001,purchase,129.50
2024-01-15 08:15:00,1003,login,0
2024-01-15 08:20:30,1003,purchase,75.00
2024-01-15 08:25:10,1001,logout,0
2024-01-15 08:30:00,1004,login,0
2024-01-15 08:35:45,1002,purchase,200.00
2024-01-15 08:40:00,1004,purchase,15.75
2024-01-15 08:45:20,1003,logout,0
2024-01-15 08:50:00,1005,login,0
2024-01-15 08:55:30,1005,purchase,89.99
2024-01-15 09:00:00,1002,logout,0
2024-01-15 09:05:15,1004,purchase,42.50
2024-01-15 09:10:00,1005,logout,0
2024-01-15 09:15:00,1004,logout,0
EOF

# Read and display the raw data from the same temp file
echo "Raw data written. Line count: $(wc -l < "$TEMP_INPUT")"
echo "Preview of $TEMP_INPUT:"
head -5 "$TEMP_INPUT"
echo "..."
echo ""

# --- Stage 2: Filter and Process Data ---
echo "[Stage 2] Filtering purchase records from $TEMP_INPUT into $TEMP_PROCESSED"

# Read from TEMP_INPUT, process, write to TEMP_PROCESSED
# Extract only purchase actions
echo "user_id,action,value" > "$TEMP_PROCESSED"
grep ",purchase," "$TEMP_INPUT" | while IFS=',' read -r timestamp user_id action value; do
    echo "$user_id,$action,$value" >> "$TEMP_PROCESSED"
done

echo "Filtered purchase records: $(($(wc -l < "$TEMP_PROCESSED") - 1))"
echo "Contents of $TEMP_PROCESSED:"
cat "$TEMP_PROCESSED"
echo ""

# --- Stage 3: Aggregate Results ---
echo "[Stage 3] Aggregating results from $TEMP_PROCESSED into $TEMP_RESULTS"

# Read from TEMP_PROCESSED multiple times for different aggregations
echo "=== Aggregated Results ===" > "$TEMP_RESULTS"
echo "" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"

# Total revenue calculation
total_revenue=0
while IFS=',' read -r user_id action value; do
    if [[ "$action" == "purchase" ]]; then
        total_revenue=$(echo "$total_revenue + $value" | bc 2>/dev/null || echo "$total_revenue")
    fi
done < "$TEMP_PROCESSED"
echo "Total Revenue: \$$total_revenue" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"

# Count transactions per user - read from TEMP_PROCESSED again
echo "" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"
echo "Transactions per User:" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"

# Get unique user IDs from the processed temp file
tail -n +2 "$TEMP_PROCESSED" | cut -d',' -f1 | sort -u | while read -r uid; do
    count=$(grep -c "^$uid," "$TEMP_PROCESSED")
    user_total=$(grep "^$uid," "$TEMP_PROCESSED" | cut -d',' -f3 | paste -sd+ | bc 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    echo "  User $uid: $count transaction(s), Total: \$$user_total" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"
done

# Read from TEMP_INPUT again for login/logout stats
echo "" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"
echo "Session Statistics:" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"
login_count=$(grep -c ",login," "$TEMP_INPUT")
logout_count=$(grep -c ",logout," "$TEMP_INPUT")
echo "  Total Logins: $login_count" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"
echo "  Total Logouts: $logout_count" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"

echo "Aggregation complete. Contents of $TEMP_RESULTS:"
cat "$TEMP_RESULTS"
echo ""

# --- Stage 4: Generate Summary Report ---
echo "[Stage 4] Generating final summary from $TEMP_RESULTS into $TEMP_SUMMARY"

# Read from multiple temp files to build the summary
{
    echo "============================================"
    echo "   DATA PROCESSING PIPELINE SUMMARY REPORT"
    echo "   Generated: $(date)"
    echo "   Process ID: $$"
    echo "============================================"
    echo ""
    echo "--- Input Data Statistics ---"
    echo "Source file: $TEMP_INPUT"
    echo "Total records (excluding header): $(($(wc -l < "$TEMP_INPUT") - 1))"
    echo "Unique users: $(tail -n +2 "$TEMP_INPUT" | cut -d',' -f2 | sort -u | wc -l)"
    echo ""
    echo "--- Processing Results ---"
    # Re-read results file
    cat "$TEMP_RESULTS"
    echo ""
    echo "--- Temp Files Used ---"
    echo "  Input:     $TEMP_INPUT ($(stat --format=%s "$TEMP_INPUT" 2>/dev/null || wc -c < "$TEMP_INPUT") bytes)"
    echo "  Processed: $TEMP_PROCESSED ($(stat --format=%s "$TEMP_PROCESSED" 2>/dev/null || wc -c < "$TEMP_PROCESSED") bytes)"
    echo "  Results:   $TEMP_RESULTS ($(stat --format=%s "$TEMP_RESULTS" 2>/dev/null || wc -c < "$TEMP_RESULTS") bytes)"
    echo "  Summary:   $TEMP_SUMMARY"
    echo ""
    echo "============================================"
    echo "   END OF REPORT"
    echo "============================================"
} > "$TEMP_SUMMARY"

# Final read of the summary temp file
echo ""
echo "========== FINAL REPORT =========="
cat "$TEMP_SUMMARY"
echo ""

# --- Stage 5: Verify all temp files exist ---
echo "[Stage 5] Verifying temp files..."
for tmpfile in "$TEMP_INPUT" "$TEMP_PROCESSED" "$TEMP_RESULTS" "$TEMP_SUMMARY"; do
    if [[ -f "$tmpfile" ]]; then
        echo "  ✓ EXISTS: $tmpfile ($(wc -l < "$tmpfile") lines)"
    else
        echo "  ✗ MISSING: $tmpfile"
    fi
done
echo ""

# --- Cleanup ---
echo "[Cleanup] Removing temporary files..."
for tmpfile in "$TEMP_INPUT" "$TEMP_PROCESSED" "$TEMP_RESULTS" "$TEMP_SUMMARY"; do
    if [[ -f "$tmpfile" ]]; then
        rm -f "$tmpfile"
        echo "  Removed: $tmpfile"
    fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== Pipeline Complete ==="
